sources.title: Carbon Analytics AI Global Market Report 2026
sources.key_claim: Carbon Analytics AI market grew from $2.66B (2025) to $3.42B (2026) at 28.3% CAGR; projected to reach $9.18B by 2030

sources.title: AI Carbon Footprint Management Software Market Size, Share & 2031 Growth Trends Report
sources.key_claim: AI Carbon Footprint Management Software Market worth USD 2.17 billion in 2026, growing at CAGR of 20.70% to reach USD 5.56 billion by 2031

sources.title: Climate Tech Funding Surges in H1 2026 on Growing Data Center Demand for Low-Carbon Power
sources.key_claim: VC climate tech investment reached $26.1 billion in H1 2026, up 55% over H1 2025; average round size jumped from $18M to $27M

sources.title: Carbon Management Software Vendor Watershed Raises $100 Million in Series C Funding
sources.key_claim: Watershed raised $100M Series C in February 2024 at $1.8B valuation; 800+ corporate buyers including 90 Fortune 500 companies; $225M total raised; named Leader in 2026 Verdantix Green Quadrant

sources.title: CSRD Explained (2026): Requirements, Scope & How to Comply
sources.key_claim: CSRD mandatory for companies with 1,000+ employees and €450M+ turnover (first filings 2026 covering FY2025 data); 61% reduction in mandatory datapoints from ~1,100 to ~430

sources.title: Watershed Launches AI-Powered Product Carbon Footprint Solution
sources.key_claim: Watershed Product Footprints uses AI to calculate emissions at the SKU level via bill-of-materials ingestion; replaces manual lifecycle assessment studies costing $50K–$200K each

sources.title: Carbon Intelligence Platforms Market Share, Size, Report 2026
sources.key_claim: Carbon Intelligence Platforms market size reached $2.91B in 2025; projected to reach $7.95B by 2030 at CAGR of 22.3%

sources.title: Carbon Management Software Market Size & Share Analysis
sources.key_claim: Carbon Management Software Market worth USD 18.17 billion in 2026; growing at CAGR of 11.63% to reach USD 31.5 billion by 2031; IBM leads with ~11% market share; top 5 players hold ~45%

sources.publisher: IESE Business School — Finance and Nature Blog
sources.title: The CSRD by 2026: Regulatory Evolution, Political Tensions, and the Future of Sustainable Finance
sources.key_claim: 50,000+ EU companies subject to CSRD; only 9% of organisations can comprehensively monitor Scope 3 emissions; Scope 3 = 80-90% of typical corporate footprint

sources.title: How the 2026 Climate Tech Market is Shaping Up So Far
sources.key_claim: Climate-tech VC H1 2026 records strongest fundraising H1 since 2022; power solutions targeting data center market experienced record growth in private and public markets

sources.title: AI Scope 3 Tracking 2026: Real-Time Emissions Monitoring
sources.key_claim: Sustainability teams report up to 70% time savings on emissions tracking and reporting with AI platforms vs manual processes

sources.title: Greenly raises $52M Series B for AI carbon accounting platform
sources.key_claim: Greenly has raised $75M total ($23M Series A + $52M Series B); clients include LVMH and L'Oréal; $10M+ revenue (2023); EcoPilot AI feature for SME carbon reporting

unverified_claims.claim: Greenly 2025/2026 revenue figure — last confirmed revenue data is $10M (2023); 2024-2026 figures estimated
Exact SAP carbon management market share — IBM ~11%, SAP ~9%, Microsoft ~10% figures sourced from aggregate market reports; individual company confirmation unavailable
Specific 3-month growth figure of +7% — calculated as quarterly approximation of 28.3% annual CAGR; not a directly sourced quarterly figure
